x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Device registration in DEX establishes the endpoint population that AI diagnostic capabilities analyze. Without sufficient registered devices, DEX AI has no data to pattern-match against for proactive issue detection and root cause analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enforce category as mandatory on KB article creation via UI policy. Bulk-categorize existing articles via the list editor. Target: 95%+ of published articles with a category assigned.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_7af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c44
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Device registration in DEX establishes the endpoint population that AI diagnostic capabilities analyze. Without sufficient registered devices, DEX AI has no data to pattern-match against for proactive issue detection and root cause analysis.]]></ai_justification><check_name>KB Categorization Completeness</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaPublished = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaPublished.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaPublished.addQuery('active', true);
    gaPublished.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaPublished.query();
    var published = gaPublished.next() ? parseInt(gaPublished.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (published === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No published KB articles found',
            finding: 'No published KB articles found. Categorization completeness cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCat = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaCat.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaCat.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCat.addQuery('kb_category', '!=', '');
    gaCat.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCat.query();
    var withCat = gaCat.next() ? parseInt(gaCat.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withCat / published) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% categorized (' + withCat + ' of ' + published + ' articles have category)';

    if (pct >= 95) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of published KB articles have a category. Now Assist AI Search can accurately scope and filter results by category.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of published KB articles are categorized (target: 95%+). Uncategorized articles reduce Now Assist AI Search filtering accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of published KB articles have a category. Insufficient categorization — Now Assist AI Search cannot accurately scope results without category data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000318</number><order>40</order><remediation_guidance>Enforce category as mandatory on KB article creation via UI policy. Bulk-categorize existing articles via the list editor. Target: 95%+ of published articles with a category assigned.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>7af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c44</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>KB Categorization Completeness</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_7af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c44</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
